description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A clinical research coordinator accidentally removed a newly enrolled subject (DM-105) instead of viewing their record. The subject and their completed Baseline Assessment data are now hidden from the default site views. Using OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), restore subject DM-105 to 'Available' (Active) status and lock their 'Baseline Assessment' event. Ensure you only lock the specific event, not the entire subject record, and do not modify any other subjects (e.g., DM-101).
